title: Middle Eastern Knafeh with Olive Tapenade
description: A creamy and savory dessert inspired by Middle Eastern cuisine, featuring a crispy knafeh crust and a rich olive tapenade filling.

ingredients.name: Knafeh
ingredients.notes: available in most Middle Eastern markets

ingredients.name: Green olives
ingredients.notes: use a combination of green and black olives for added flavor

ingredients.name: Eastern olives
ingredients.notes: add a salty, savory flavor to the tapenade

ingredients.name: Fatty cream
ingredients.notes: heavy cream or half-and-half work well

ingredients.name: Fresh parsley
ingredients.notes: garnish the tapenade with fresh parsley

instructions: Crumble the knafeh into a bowl and mix with a pinch of salt.
Transfer the knafeh mixture to a baking dish and press it into an even layer.
Bake the knafeh for 10-12 minutes, or until golden brown.
While the knafeh is baking, make the olive tapenade by combining the green and Eastern olives in a blender or food processor.
Add the fatty cream and mix until smooth and creamy.
Stir in the softened cream cheese until well combined.
Once the knafeh is ready, remove it from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes.
Spoon the olive tapenade over the knafeh and garnish with fresh parsley.
